name: Northwest Harvest
description: Washington State's largest hunger-relief agency. Northwest Harvest operates a statewide network of food banks and partners to provide nutritious food to people in need — with dignity and respect.
description_es: La agencia de alivio del hambre más grande del estado de Washington. Opera una red estatal de bancos de alimentos para proporcionar alimentos nutritivos a personas necesitadas con dignidad y respeto.

name: DESC — Downtown Emergency Service Center
description: DESC provides housing, crisis services, and mental health and substance use treatment to Seattle's most vulnerable adults experiencing homelessness. Over 3,000 people served annually.
description_es: DESC brinda vivienda, servicios de crisis y tratamiento de salud mental a los adultos más vulnerables de Seattle que experimentan falta de vivienda. Más de 3,000 personas atendidas anualmente.

name: Mary's Place
description: Mary's Place provides safe refuge for women, children, and families experiencing homelessness. With multiple shelter sites across the Seattle area, Mary's Place offers not just a bed but pathways to stability.
description_es: Mary's Place proporciona refugio seguro para mujeres, niños y familias sin hogar. Con múltiples sitios de refugio en el área de Seattle, ofrece no solo una cama sino caminos hacia la estabilidad.

name: FareStart
description: FareStart transforms lives through the power of food. Their culinary job training programs serve adults facing barriers to employment, with an 85%+ job placement rate into living-wage positions.
description_es: FareStart transforma vidas a través del poder de la comida. Sus programas de capacitación culinaria sirven a adultos con barreras de empleo, con una tasa de colocación laboral superior al 85%.

name: Year Up
description: Year Up bridges the Opportunity Divide by providing young adults (18–24) with a combination of technical and professional skills, an internship, and college credits — in just one year.
description_es: Year Up cierra la brecha de oportunidades brindando a jóvenes adultos (18–24) habilidades técnicas y profesionales, una pasantía y créditos universitarios, todo en un año.

name: Literacy Source
description: Literacy Source empowers adults in Seattle with the reading, writing, math, and digital skills they need to thrive. Free tutoring, GED prep, and job-skills classes for all adults.
description_es: Literacy Source empodera a los adultos en Seattle con las habilidades de lectura, escritura, matemáticas y digitales que necesitan para prosperar. Tutoría gratuita, preparación para GED y clases.

name: Sea Mar Community Health Centers
description: Sea Mar provides comprehensive healthcare and social services to diverse communities in Washington State, with a mission to improve the wellbeing of underserved populations. Bilingual care throughout.
description_es: Sea Mar proporciona atención médica integral y servicios sociales a comunidades diversas en el estado de Washington, con una misión de mejorar el bienestar de las poblaciones desatendidas.

name: Refugee Women's Alliance (ReWA)
description: ReWA provides comprehensive services to refugees, immigrants, and underserved communities in Washington State, including ESL, job training, case management, and family services in 20+ languages.
description_es: ReWA brinda servicios integrales a refugiados, inmigrantes y comunidades desatendidas en Washington, incluyendo inglés, capacitación laboral, gestión de casos y servicios familiares en más de 20 idiomas.
